SHOUJOKAGEKIAIJOKAREN-ENABLE_DATA_UPLOAD: Whether to upload run history JSON to the statistics server after each run.
SHOUJOKAGEKIAIJOKAREN-SPLASH.title: Splash Screen
SHOUJOKAGEKIAIJOKAREN-SHOW_SPLASH_SCREEN: Show the giraffe splash screen before the MegaCrit logo on game startup.
SHOUJOKAGEKIAIJOKAREN-GENERATE_MOD_INFO_: This will generate card screenshots and index files for the mod info HTML. It may take a while. Continue?
